parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', prompt: 'You are an expert data extraction assistant. Analyze the following call transcript and extract a structured Account Memo in JSON format.

TRANSCRIPT:
' + $json.transcript + '

Extract these fields as JSON: account_id (from company name, lowercase with underscores), company_name, business_hours (days, start, end, timezone, exceptions), office_address, services_supported (list), emergency_definition (list), emergency_routing_rules (during_hours/after_hours with primary, fallback_chain, timeout_seconds, final_fallback), non_emergency_routing_rules, call_transfer_rules, integration_constraints, after_hours_flow_summary, office_hours_flow_summary, questions_or_unknowns, notes.

CRITICAL: Output valid JSON only. Do NOT hallucinate. Flag missing info in questions_or_unknowns.', stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', prompt: 'You are updating an existing Account Memo with information from an onboarding call.

EXISTING MEMO:
' + JSON.stringify($json.existing_memo) + '

ONBOARDING TRANSCRIPT:
' + $json.transcript + '

Update the memo with changes from the onboarding call. If new info contradicts old, use NEW. Add new items, remove deleted ones. Output complete updated JSON.', stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', prompt: 'Generate a Retell AI Agent Spec from this Account Memo. Include: agent_name, voice_style, system_prompt (detailed with greeting, emergency/non-emergency flows, transfer protocols, closing - NEVER mention function calls to callers), key_variables, tool_invocation_placeholders, call_transfer_protocol, fallback_protocol, version: v1.

ACCOUNT MEMO:
' + JSON.stringify($json.memo) + '

Output valid JSON only.', stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', prompt: 'Generate an updated Retell AI Agent Spec (v2) from this updated Account Memo. Include all fields: agent_name, voice_style, system_prompt (with updated flows), key_variables, tool_invocation_placeholders, call_transfer_protocol, fallback_protocol, version: v2.

UPDATED MEMO:
' + JSON.stringify($json.updated_memo) + '

Output valid JSON only.', stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1 } }) }}

meta.description: Clara Answers call processing pipeline. Pipeline A processes demo calls (v1). Pipeline B processes onboarding calls (v2 with changelog).
meta.notes: Requires: Ollama running with llama3.2:3b model. Mount /data volume for output storage.
